title: World Cup 2026 Update — Apr 02, 2026
summary: The full 48-team World Cup field was confirmed on March 31 with Iraq (beat Bolivia 2-1) and DR Congo (beat Jamaica 1-0 AET) claiming the final two spots — correcting earlier data that had wrongly attributed qualification to Bolivia and Jamaica. The USMNT ended their March camp with a 0-2 loss to Portugal, combining with the 2-5 Belgium defeat for an alarming 2-7 aggregate 70 days from kickoff. FIFA officially confirmed Iran's World Cup participation on April 1 despite Iran's Sports Minister saying the opposite — the FIFA Congress in Vancouver on April 30 is the next decision point. Last-minute ticket sales launched April 1 but were immediately marred by a website glitch on April 2, rerouting buyers into the wrong queue for 90+ minutes.

title: World Cup 2026 Update — Mar 30, 2026
summary: Amnesty International's 'Humanity Must Win' report warned that the World Cup risks becoming a 'stage for repression,' citing mass deportations and ICE enforcement near stadiums — FIFA has still not secured any enforcement moratorium with 73 days to kickoff. Iraq's squad completed an overland journey via Jordan to arrive in Monterrey for Tuesday's final vs Bolivia, after regional airspace closures caused by the ongoing US-Iran conflict. Italy braced for a hostile atmosphere in Zenica amid the Dimarco controversy ahead of the Bosnia-Herzegovina final. The USMNT held final pre-match training for their March 31 Portugal friendly — the last test before Pochettino's May 26 roster announcement — with Portugal missing Ronaldo, Leão, and Diogo Costa.

title: World Cup 2026 Update — Mar 29, 2026
summary: The USMNT suffered a sobering 2–5 defeat to Belgium on March 28 at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta — Belgium outshot the US 21–12, with Dodi Lukébakio scoring a brace and Pochettino admitting his team failed to sustain intensity against a top-10 side. Iran's World Cup participation crisis deepened further: while Iran confirmed participation on March 20, the March 27 government decree banning travel to 'hostile' countries directly conflicts with all three of Iran's Group G fixtures in the US, leaving the venue question unresolved with 74 days to kickoff. Six World Cup qualification finals on March 31 will complete the 48-team field — Italy vs Bosnia (Path A), Sweden vs Poland (Path B), Kosovo vs Turkey (Path C — winner joins the USMNT's group), Denmark vs Czechia (Path D), Jamaica vs DR Congo, and Bolivia vs Iraq. Events for gap days March 24–25 and March 29 were added covering pre-playoff preparation coverage, Iraq's complex overland travel to Monterrey, and post-Belgium match analysis.

title: World Cup 2026 Update — Mar 28, 2026
summary: USMNT hosts Belgium today at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta (3:30 PM ET) in the first of two final pre-World Cup friendlies, debuting new 'Stars and Stripes' kits as Pochettino finalises his 48-team roster plan. Iran's World Cup crisis deepened on March 27 as the Sports Ministry issued a formal ban on national teams traveling to 'hostile' countries — directly blocking Iran's three Group G matches at US venues; FIFA rejected a renewed request to relocate matches to Mexico. All six playoff finals remain set for March 31: UEFA (Italy vs. Bosnia, Sweden vs. Poland, Kosovo vs. Turkey, Denmark vs. Czechia) and FIFA intercontinental (DR Congo vs. Jamaica, Iraq vs. Bolivia) — completing the 48-team field. USMNT 27-man squad was announced on March 23 with Antonee Robinson and Chris Richards returning.

title: World Cup 2026 Update — Mar 27, 2026
summary: March 26 playoff day delivered dramatic results across all 10 semifinals. Kosovo stunned Slovakia 4–3 in the biggest upset of the European playoffs, while Viktor Gyökeres scored a hat-trick as Sweden thrashed Ukraine 3–0. Italy beat Northern Ireland 2–0 (Tonali, Kean) and Bosnia eliminated Wales on penalties to set up an Italy–Bosnia Path A final on March 31. In Mexico, Bolivia defeated Suriname 2–1 and Jamaica beat New Caledonia 1–0, setting up DR Congo–Jamaica and Iraq–Bolivia intercontinental finals. All six World Cup berths remain to be decided in the March 31 finals. FIFA also announced a last-minute ticket sales phase opening April 1, amid continued fan backlash over pricing.

title: World Cup 2026 Update — Mar 26, 2026
summary: March 26 marks a decisive day in the race to complete the 48-team World Cup field, with all eight UEFA playoff semifinals and two FIFA intercontinental playoff semifinals taking place simultaneously. Italy secured their spot in the Path A final with a 1–0 victory over Northern Ireland at Stadio di Bergamo, keeping the Azzurri on track to avoid a third consecutive World Cup absence. In Mexico, Bolivia faced Suriname in Monterrey and Jamaica took on New Caledonia in Guadalajara for intercontinental spots that will send the winners on to face Iraq and DR Congo respectively in March 31 finals. Across four UEFA paths, high-profile ties including Wales vs Bosnia, Ukraine vs Sweden, Turkey vs Romania, and Denmark vs North Macedonia are determining which four European nations claim the last spots in the expanded 48-team tournament beginning June 11.

title: World Cup 2026 Update — Mar 22, 2026
summary: With 81 days to the June 11 kickoff, the FIFA World Cup 2026 enters its final qualification phase. The intercontinental playoffs on March 26 and 31 will be hosted at Mexican venues (Estadio Guadalajara and Estadio Monterrey), with DR Congo, Iraq, New Caledonia, Bolivia, Jamaica, and Suriname competing for two final World Cup berths. Simultaneously, 16 UEFA teams compete for 4 European spots on the same dates. The 48-team, 104-match tournament will span 16 host cities across the USA, Mexico, and Canada, with the final scheduled for July 19 at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey.
